People with braces cannot manipulate gravity at will because the presence of braces does not grant any special physical or metaphysical abilities related to gravitational control. Braces are orthodontic devices used to correct misaligned teeth and jaws, and they have no effect on fundamental physical laws such as gravity. The idea of manipulating gravity at will is currently beyond the realm of human capability and is not supported by scientific evidence. This limitation is not due to the braces themselves, but rather a universal human weakness.
